summary: TTS | Navigation options in the middle middle
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Following Teams page

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to one of the following: BOS, CIN, DET, LAA, MIL, NYY, SD, STL
steps.result: THEN the app should say “The [focused_team] is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your follow team. Move in any direction to continue to highlight teams to follow.
